steps.title: Read the phrase in context
steps.content: In "more deep seclusion," the word "deep" describes the degree of seclusion impressed by the cliffs. It is not about physical depth; it intensifies the feeling of withdrawal and quiet.

steps.title: Rule out mismatched senses
steps.content: A means difficult, B means ugly, and C means complex. None captures the heightened emotional force of "deep seclusion." The answer is D.
